evals.expected_output: Should default to fun-facts.md, run all 10 checks, report findings per check with line numbers, end with summary table. Should find: 0 duplicates, anachronism issues (Mishnah/Talmud used definitively for 1st-century texts), oversimplification flags (e.g. 其實是 on debated topics), and verbosity flags for long entries.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查：fun-facts.md' or similar header identifying the file
All 10 checks appear as ### headers numbered 1 through 10
Check 1 (重複) reports 0 duplicates or ✅ 通過
Check 3 (年代錯置) flags at least one entry using Mishnah or Talmud definitively for NT-era texts
Check 8 (過度簡化) flags at least one entry using 其實是 or similar definitive language on debated topics
Output ends with a summary table using | 檢查 | 結果 | format
Summary includes '共 X 個問題，跨 Y 項檢查' line
Report uses 上主 (not 耶和華 or YHWH) when referring to the divine name
Report does NOT auto-fix or rewrite any entries — only reports issues

evals.expected_output: Should review denomination-claims.md with all 10 checks. Some checks may not apply (e.g. strawman, interest threshold) and should be marked N/A. Should still produce proper format with summary table.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查：denomination-claims.md' or similar header
All 10 checks appear as ### headers
At least one check is marked N/A or 此檢查不適用 when inapplicable
Output ends with a summary table
Report does NOT auto-fix any content

evals.prompt:
幫我檢查這段經文冷知識：
- 保羅在大馬士革路上從馬背上摔下來（使徒行傳 9:4）
- 約拿在鯨魚肚子裡三天三夜（約拿書 1:17）
- 十誡共有十二條（出埃及記 20 章）
- 耶穌在客西馬尼園禱告時流血汗（路加福音 22:44），這證明他只是普通人
evals.expected_output: Should review pasted text. Should catch: (1) factual error — Acts 9 never mentions a horse; (2) factual error — Jonah 1:17 says 大魚 not whale; (3) counting error — Ten Commandments are 10 not 12; (4) oversimplification — bloody sweat proving 'only human' is one-sided.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查' header identifying this as user-provided content
Check 4 (事實錯誤) flags the horse claim — Acts 9 does not mention a horse/馬
Check 4 or 5 flags the whale claim — Jonah 1:17 says 大魚 (dag gadol) not 鯨魚
Check 6 (數量計算) flags 十二條 as incorrect — should be ten
Check 8 (過度簡化) flags the 'only human' conclusion as oversimplified
Output ends with a summary table
Finds at least 3 distinct issues across the 4 entries

evals.expected_output: Should review translation-bias.md with all 10 checks. Translation comparison content should trigger check 3 (anachronism) awareness and check 8 (oversimplification) for definitive claims about translation superiority.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查' header identifying translation-bias.md
All 10 checks appear as ### headers
Output ends with a summary table with | 檢查 | 結果 | format
Summary includes total issue count and check count
Report does NOT auto-fix any content

evals.prompt: 幫我檢查這篇烈火特會的報導文章（檔案在 bible-buddy/references/cdn-fire-conference.txt）
evals.expected_output: Should review the fire conference news article. Should detect: (1) verse reference error — John 5:19 mislabeled as Luke 5:19; (2) implicit charismatic/NAR terminology — 使徒性網絡 matches NAR five-fold ministry (1990s-2000s) per anachronism-timeline.md; (3) 聖靈充滿 used as ongoing state without scriptural grounding for conference-renewal model.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查' header
Check 5 (經節編號) flags Line 47 — John 5:19 mislabeled as 路加福音 5:19
Check 3 (年代錯置) flags 使徒性網絡 or 使徒性 as NAR terminology with post-1990s origin
Check 3 or 8 flags the 聖靈充滿/烈火 framework as lacking first-century scriptural grounding
Output ends with a summary table
Finds at least 3 distinct issues
